I found one that didn't really quite fit into this training but it's really important for unconscious communication. Let's cut to this footage right now. Human communication. There are three aspects. They have your tonality which makes up about 40% of human communication or 50% depending on what study you buy into. Then you have your body language which makes up 40% or 50% depending on what study you buy into. Then the last 9% which is pretty much is constant is the actual words that you say. The words only make up 9% of human communication. Let me stop for one second here. That's not to say that the words are absolutely critical because when you're talking, when you're actually speaking those words, they matter 100%. The point is you're communicating very often without even speaking. When you're speaking, the words do matter but you so often are communicating on an unconscious level through tonality, through body language. When all three of those are wrapped up in unison at the right level and being executed correctly, bam, then you're really making headway. That's how you get yourself boom into that instant and that powerful, that must have rapport. All right. You're back. Cool stuff. Just remember this.
